core_idea: W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff is a Damage Dealer / Support — **Charge** cycle — build Count toward **20**, spend on empowered skills (often **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive**), then rebuild for the next window. **Guard: CCA Overcharge** queues an extra **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive** next turn and can remove a Stagger Threshold when Charge Count is low — guard sets up the burst. Scaling conditions: Clash Power +1 per 6 Charge (max +2); At 3+ Charge, Coin Power +1. Support passive (**One day I'll wear me Armour for Cancelled Trains**) keys off **deployment order** — set your main carry as #1 deployed before the fight.
playstyle_guide:
- **One day I'll wear me Armour for Cancelled Trains** watches the **#1 deployed ally** — arrange the dashboard so the intended carry is first in line.
- **Charge Count** caps at **20** — build with lighter skills, dump stacks on empowered coins, then ramp back up for the next cycle.
- When ready, spend **10** stacks on **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive** for **+4 Coin Power**, then start building again.
- **Charge Potency** adds up to **+5 Clash Power** on **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive** — higher Potency tiers matter on the spend turn.
- At **3+ Charge Potency** (or below 50% HP), **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive** converts all coins to **Unbreakable**.
- **Guard: CCA Overcharge** queues **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive** for the next turn when conditions are met — use the guard slot to set up a high-impact attack on the following turn.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: Clash Power +1 per 6 Charge (max +2).
- Hold S3 for when At 10+ Charge Count is met — that condition is what unlocks its full damage ceiling.

**S1 — Congestion Cleanup** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low / Average stacked).
- **Clash Power** scales with **Charge** (+1 per 6, max +2) — build stacks first.
- Needs 3+ Charge to activate — prioritise building stacks before using.
- **Clash Power** scales with **Charge Count** (+1 per 6, max +2) — build stacks first.
- Gain +3 Charge Count

**S2 — Boost: Elbow Blade** (BP 5, CP +6, x2): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Extremely High / Slightly High stacked).
- At **6+ Charge Count**: spend **6** stacks for **+1 Coin Power** — save this for your dump turn.
- Needs 3+ Charge to activate — prioritise building stacks before using.
- Gain +5 Charge Count; [On Hit] Inflict +1 Rupture Count

**S3 — Rip Space - CCA Overdrive** (BP 3, CP +2, x4): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- At **10+ Charge Count**: spend **10** stacks for **+4 Coin Power** — save this for your dump turn.
- **Clash Power** equals **Charge Potency** (up to **+5**) — raise Potency before the spend flip.
- Final coin consumes up to **10 Charge Count** for matching **Coin Power** — align the dump with your highest stack turn.
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- Gain +1 Charge Count
- Gain +2 Charge Count

Combat passive — **Defence-Oriented Charge**: Gain 1 Charge every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative Charge Count in this Encounter.
  - Turn Start: Gain Defense Level Up equal to Charge Potency on self (max 6).

Combat passive — **Congestion Cleaning Armour**: Combat Start: If this unit has less than 50% HP, gain Shield equal to (Charge Potency x 5) (max 25).
  - Immediately before getting hit, gain Shield equal to (Charge Potency on self) (max 5, 3 times per turn).
  - If this unit gains Charge Count past the Max Charge Count Cap by using a Skill, the Skill deals +3% damage for every Charge Count that ex….

Defense skill — **Guard: CCA Overcharge**: Clashable Guard.
  - [Combat Start] At less than 15 Charge Count, gain the following effects:.
  - Gain Overcharge next turn (max 1 per turn).
  - Turn End: Remove this unit's first Stagger Threshold (once per Encounter).
team_suggestions: **Charge** cycle — build Count toward **20**, spend on empowered skills (often **Rip Space - CCA Overdrive**), then rebuild for the next window.

- **R Corp. 4th Pack Rhino Meursault**: This identity's 'One day I'll wear me Armour for Cancelled Trains' inflicts Charge — R Corp. 4th Pack Rhino Meursault scales off Charge.
